purpose: Add a new governed filename or file type into the manager's supported governance surface.
instruction: new-file defines support for a new governed file kind
new-file must add the matching structure template and lint coverage
new-file must update tool behavior and rule assets together
workflow: define the new governed filename or file type
update scan rules, lint coverage, and supporting tool behavior
validate dry-run behavior against the user's expectation
sync mirror and installed skill assets
rules: new-file is not scaffold; it does not create user directory instances by itself
new-file must complete governance support before the new file kind becomes active
